productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Black Anzo Breeze Casual Shoes
description: The Fit and feel of high-performance footwear is all combined in the adidas Anzo Breeze shoes that is a comfortable, all-purpose, mid-cut nubuck shoe. Outdoor-inspired detailing, felt effect and interior comfort is all for the taking and surely makes for a perfect buy. Pair it with rugged jeans and t-shirts for an adventure of a life time.UpperNubuck with synthetic leather overlays for durability and styleSlip-on style for ease of wearElasticated sides on the midfoot for a snug and customised fitPull tabs on the heel for easy on/offOutsoleTextured TPU outsole with terraced lugs for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
